name: Apple Cinnamon Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Roasted pecans or other nuts (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring apple juice, water, and salt to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Stir in Rice and Shine and cinnamon.
3. Turn off heat and let simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped nuts and vanilla.
5. Let cool slightly, then pour into a 9-inch square pan.
6. Refrigerate until set and cool.
7. Serve squares plain or with a little fruit syrup.
